title: Senior Doctor - Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners:
Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners!
